seoTitle: Campwin Beach vs Canal Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campwin Beach and Canal Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campwin Beach vs Canal Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campwin Beach and Canal Creek.
heading: Campwin Beach vs Canal Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campwin Beach, Queensland and Canal Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canal Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Campwin Beach (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campwin Beach or Canal Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campwin Beach has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Canal Creek scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campwin Beach scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Canal Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campwin Beach or Canal Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canal Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
